name: obsidian-reading-assistant
description: Create, annotate, and extract highlights from Obsidian documents for LLM consumption

scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run bundle -- --watch
scripts.check: biome check src tests README.md AGENTS.md styles.css package.json manifest.json tsconfig.json jest.config.js biome.json
scripts.format: biome format --write src tests README.md AGENTS.md styles.css package.json manifest.json tsconfig.json jest.config.js biome.json
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run check && npm run build && npm run bundle

author: Matthew Finlayson
